calendar.matters:
Syd Carpenter Marine Contractor, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Pursuant To C.C.P 583.310
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Thomas A. Steig of PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing for defendant / moving party Syd Carpenter Marine Contractor, Inc.
Pro Per plaintiff Shirley Russell appearing on her own behalf.

RULING:
DEFENDANT SYD CARPENTER MARINE CONTRACTOR, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS PURSUANT TO C.C.P 583.310

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Syd Carpenter Marine Contractor, Inc.'s motion to dismiss is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 583.310 and 583.360. The action is dismissed as to defendant Syd Carpenter Marine Contractor, Inc. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, matter not reported (503/CML)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sharon L. Clisham, Esq. of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party Thomas Dee Engineering Company
Latisha Redhead, plaintiff's grandniece, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Shirley Thompson

RULING:
DEFENDANT THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY's Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Thomas Dee Engineering Company's motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar May-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sharone L. Clisham, Esq. of WALSWORTH FRANKLIN BEVINS & McCALL (415-781-7072), appearing for defendant / moving party QUINTEC INDUSTRIES, INC.

RULING:
Defendant Quintec Industries's motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is granted. No opposition filed. The complaint was filed in 1997, over 5 years ago. A hearing is required unless defendant's counsel advises the plaintiff of the tentative ruling and the plaintiff states that he does not wish to contest the tentative ruling. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
